name: Monster Arena 2
summary: Monster Arena 2 is a sequel of the recently released monster arena vr on meta. This single player meta virtual reality game comprises of 10 levels.  Shoot the monsters and creatures around you and create a high score.   This virtual reality game will transform the player to a new world to a new dimension filled with greedy monsters and creatures.  try new vr shooter open world quest game. This new vr shooter game takes your vr experience to next level
